column5: Direction: I→friend (give). もらう = I receive from.
Family: in-group. くれる for me. あげる=away from me.
To superior: humble さしあげる required.
To child: casual やる. あげる=neutral.

column1: 私は田中さんから本を___。

Family: both work, but くれる=closer.

column5: Parent context: both work, くれる=natural.
